contribution: Anchor writer. Authored atmospheric prose for 'fog-beach' (opening — isolation, wet sensory dread, the fog as a sentient presence) and 'lantern-room' (climactic confrontation — supernatural revelation, the lens etchings, the face-that-isn't-yours). Provided the core horror voice and thematic continuity for the island's malevolent presence.

Wildcard writer. Authored prose for 'keepers-cottage' (interrupted life — warm coffee gone cold, keys in the logbook, salt-bag ritual) and 'tower-base' (threshold anxiety — the stairs as a throat, the mineral taste of dread). Delivered surprising metaphors and unexpected angles on domestic horror.

persona: The Dark Scribe — Sensory Dread Specialist
contribution: Specialist in sensory horror and threat implication. Authored prose for 'cottage-cellar' (claustrophobic dread — wet stone, breathing walls, the wrongness of held brass) and 'foghorn-station' (auditory horror — the subsonic drone felt in molars, the foghorn as a malevolent voice). Focused on the physical, visceral wrongness of spaces.
